title: Rf filter, rf filter component and method of manufacturing an rf filter
abstract: An RF filter having improved filter characteristics and in particular a reduced variation of filter properties is provided. The RF filter has a transmission line filter stage (FS1) electrically connected between a first port (PI) and a second port (P2). The transmission line filter stage (FS1) has a transmission line structure (TL) and a capacitance element (CE, CE1). A first circuit element (CE1) of the transmission line filter stage is arranged on a carrier substrate (CS) suitable for electroacoustic filter elements.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. RF filter, comprising - a first port and a second port and - a transmission line filter stage electrically connected between the first port and the second port, wherein - the transmission line filter stage comprises transmission line structures and a capacitance element, - a first circuit element of the transmission line filter stage is arranged on a carrier substrate suitable for electroacoustic filter elements. 2. The RF filter of the previous claim, wherein the carrier substrate comprises a material selected from a piezoelectric material, a glass, a silicon containing material, a silicon nitride, Si 3 N 4 . 3. The RF filter of one of the previous claims, further comprising - a second filter stage electrically connected between the first port and the second port, wherein - the second filter stage is an electroacoustic filter stage and comprises electroacoustic filter structures, - a first filter structure of the electroacoustic filter stage is arranged on the carrier substrate. 4. The RF filter of the previous claim, wherein the first filter structure of the electroacoustic filter stage is selected from 

- an SAW resonator, a TF-SAW resonator, GBAW resonator, a BAW resonator, an SMR-type BAW resonator, a FBAR-type BAW resonator . 5. The RF filter of one of the previous claims, wherein the first circuit element of the transmission line filter stage has a construction like an electroacoustic structure but is acoustically inactive. 6. The RF filter of one of the previous claims, wherein the first circuit element of the transmission line filter stage has a trimming element. 7. The RF filter of one of the previous claims, - further comprising a third port, wherein - the transmission line filter stage is electrically connected between the first port and the third port. 8. The RF filter of one of the previous claims being selected from a multiplexer, a diplexer, a duplexer. 9. An RF filter component, comprising - a base substrate and a carrier substrate, wherein - the carrier substrate is arranged on and electrically connected to the base substrate, - the carrier substrate comprises a first circuit element of a transmission line filter stage and a first circuit element of an electroacoustic filter stage, - the base substrate provides a capacitance element and/or an inductance element. 10. A method of manufacturing an RF filter, comprising the steps - providing a carrier substrate suitable for electroacoustic filter elements, - structuring a first circuit element of a transmission line filter stage on the carrier substrate. 11. The method according to the previous claim, wherein the first circuit element is a capacitance element or a transmission line. 12. The method according to the two previous claims, wherein structuring the first circuit element of the transmission line filter stage comprises - depositing material of a trimming element, - trimming the first circuit element via selectively removing material from the trimming element . 13. The method according to the three previous claims, comprising one or more steps selected from - measuring a thickness map of the carrier substrate, - measuring a thickness map of the trimming element, and - determining a removal map for the trimming element. 14. The method according to the four previous claims, further comprising the step - structuring a first circuit element of an electroacoustic filter stage on the carrier substrate, wherein - the steps for structuring the first circuit element of the transmission line filter stage and the steps for structuring the first circuit element of the electroacoustic filter stage share one process step.
